mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO query_metrics_agg_5m ( instance_id, database_id, collected_at, total_queries, avg_execution_time_ms, slow_query_count, total_io_blocks, top_slow_query_1, top_slow_query_1_time, top_slow_query_2, top_slow_query_2_time, top_slow_query_3, top_slow_query_3_time, top_slow_query_4, top_slow_query_4_time, top_slow_query_5, top_slow_query_5_time, created_at ) VALUES
( #{m.instanceId}, #{m.databaseId}, #{m.collectedAt}, #{m.totalQueries}, #{m.avgExecutionTimeMs}, #{m.slowQueryCount}, #{m.totalIoBlocks}, #{m.topSlowQuery1}, #{m.topSlowQuery1Time}, #{m.topSlowQuery2}, #{m.topSlowQuery2Time}, #{m.topSlowQuery3}, #{m.topSlowQuery3Time}, #{m.topSlowQuery4}, #{m.topSlowQuery4Time}, #{m.topSlowQuery5}, #{m.topSlowQuery5Time}, NOW() )
ON CONFLICT (instance_id, database_id, collected_at) DO UPDATE SET total_queries = EXCLUDED.total_queries, avg_execution_time_ms = EXCLUDED.avg_execution_time_ms, slow_query_count = EXCLUDED.slow_query_count, total_io_blocks = EXCLUDED.total_io_blocks, top_slow_query_1 = EXCLUDED.top_slow_query_1, top_slow_query_1_time = EXCLUDED.top_slow_query_1_time, top_slow_query_2 = EXCLUDED.top_slow_query_2, top_slow_query_2_time = EXCLUDED.top_slow_query_2_time, top_slow_query_3 = EXCLUDED.top_slow_query_3, top_slow_query_3_time = EXCLUDED.top_slow_query_3_time, top_slow_query_4 = EXCLUDED.top_slow_query_4, top_slow_query_4_time = EXCLUDED.top_slow_query_4_time, top_slow_query_5 = EXCLUDED.top_slow_query_5, top_slow_query_5_time = EXCLUDED.top_slow_query_5_time, created_at = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT instance_id AS instanceId, database_id AS databaseId, total_queries AS totalQueries, avg_execution_time_ms AS avgExecutionTimeMs, slow_query_count AS slowQueryCount, created_at AS createdAt FROM query_metrics_agg_5m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND database_id = #{databaseId} AND collected_at >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '5 minutes' ORDER BY collected_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT instance_id AS instanceId, database_id AS databaseId, top_slow_query_1 AS topSlowQuery1, top_slow_query_1_time AS topSlowQuery1Time, top_slow_query_2 AS topSlowQuery2, top_slow_query_2_time AS topSlowQuery2Time, top_slow_query_3 AS topSlowQuery3, top_slow_query_3_time AS topSlowQuery3Time, top_slow_query_4 AS topSlowQuery4, top_slow_query_4_time AS topSlowQuery4Time, top_slow_query_5 AS topSlowQuery5, top_slow_query_5_time AS topSlowQuery5Time FROM query_metrics_agg_5m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND database_id = #{databaseId} AND collected_at >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '30 minutes' ORDER BY collected_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT query_metric_id AS queryMetricId, collected_at AS collectedAt, query_text AS queryText, short_query AS shortQuery, execution_time_ms AS executionTimeMs, username, query_type AS queryType FROM query_metrics_raw WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND database_id = #{databaseId} AND execution_time_ms > 1000 AND collected_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' ORDER BY execution_time_ms DESC LIMIT 10
